name: Animation
description: Animated films, voice actors, and classic cartoon characters

questions.q: Which actor provides the voice of Woody in Pixar's 'Toy Story' films?

source.notes: Tim Allen voices Buzz Lightyear.

questions.q: In the 'Shrek' movies, what type of terrain does the ogre Shrek call home?

source.notes: Complete with an outhouse and a 'Beware the Ogre' sign.

questions.q: Which Canadian actor and comedian provides the voice of Shrek?

source.notes: Used a Scottish accent inspired by his mother.

questions.q: Who voices Gru, the supervillain-turned-hero, in the 'Despicable Me' franchise?

source.notes: Known for his fake Eastern European accent.

questions.q: Gru's loyal, gibberish-speaking yellow henchmen are known as what?

source.notes: Got their own spin-off film 'Minions' in 2015.

questions.q: Which eternally-young animated hero battles Captain Hook in Neverland?

source.notes: First Disney animated adaptation released in 1953.

questions.q: Which actor voices Po, the noodle-loving hero of 'Kung Fu Panda'?

source.notes: First film released 2008.

questions.q: Who is the Pumpkin King of Halloween Town in Tim Burton's 'The Nightmare Before Christmas'?

source.notes: Voiced by Chris Sarandon (speaking) and Danny Elfman (singing).

questions.q: In Pixar's 'Finding Nemo', what species of fish is the worried father Marlin?

source.notes: Voiced by Albert Brooks. Dory is a blue tang.

questions.q: Which body part of Pinocchio grows longer each time he tells a lie?

source.notes: From Carlo Collodi's 1883 novel; Disney adaptation released 1940.

questions.q: What is the name of Simba's father and king of the Pride Lands in 'The Lion King'?

source.notes: Voiced by James Earl Jones.

questions.q: Which Oscar-winning actor voiced the villain Scar in 'The Lion King' (1994)?

source.notes: Irons is best known for 'Reversal of Fortune' (1990).

questions.q: Which Hollywood star voices the chameleon in the 2011 animated western 'Rango'?

source.notes: Directed by Gore Verbinski; won the Oscar for Best Animated Feature.

questions.q: Which comedian lends his voice to Donkey in the 'Shrek' franchise?

source.notes: Murphy has voiced Donkey in all five Shrek films.

questions.q: Who voices the title character in Wes Anderson's 2009 stop-motion film 'Fantastic Mr. Fox'?

source.notes: Based on Roald Dahl's 1970 novel; Meryl Streep voices Mrs. Fox.

questions.q: Which Spanish actor voices the swashbuckling feline Puss in Boots in the 'Shrek' spinoffs?

source.notes: Character introduced in Shrek 2 (2004); received solo films in 2011 and 2022.

questions.q: In Disney's '101 Dalmatians', how many spotted puppies does Cruella De Vil plan to collect?

source.notes: From Dodie Smith's 1956 novel; animated film released 1961.

questions.q: Who is the creator of the long-running animated series 'The Simpsons'?

source.notes: Began as shorts on 'The Tracey Ullman Show' in 1987.

questions.q: In 'How to Train Your Dragon', the Viking village of Berk is set on which kind of location?

source.notes: A fictional rocky island; based on Cressida Cowell's book series.

questions.q: The 2009 stop-motion film 'Coraline' is based on a novella by which fantasy author?

source.notes: Book published 2002; film directed by Henry Selick.

questions.q: Which American director made his first animated feature with 'Fantastic Mr. Fox' in 2009?

source.notes: Anderson's second animated film was 'Isle of Dogs' (2018).

questions.q: Before becoming their own show, 'The Simpsons' debuted in 1987 as animated shorts on which TV program?

source.notes: Fox promoted them to their own prime-time show in December 1989.
